title: Tooltip
description: A component and directive that displays additional information when hovering over or focusing on an element, with support for different positions, themes, and custom content. Provides keyboard navigation support and follows accessibility guidelines.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using axTooltip directive

sections.title: Custom Template
sections.description: Example of tooltip with custom template content

props.name: text
props.description: The text content displayed in the tooltip.

props.name: position
props.description: Specifies the position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

props.name: axTooltip
props.description: The content to display in the tooltip. Can be a string or a template reference.

props.name: axTooltipContext
props.description: Context data to pass to the tooltip template.

props.name: axTooltipPlacement
props.description: Specifies the position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

props.name: axTooltipOffsetX
props.description: Horizontal offset for the tooltip position.

props.name: axTooltipOffsetY
props.description: Vertical offset for the tooltip position.

props.name: axTooltipOpenAfter
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before showing the tooltip.

props.name: axTooltipCloseAfter
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the tooltip.

events.name: onOpened
events.description: Emitted when the tooltip is opened.

events.name: onClosed
events.description: Emitted when the tooltip is closed.
